repair_candidate.summary: Repair koshaji's PR #81825 in place by keeping the 1Password desktop-app authentication guidance scoped to the existing skill docs while addressing the two unresolved Copilot review findings: make the standalone tmux signin example work for the documented shell expectations, and remove or replace the inaccurate tmux-skill socket-conventions reference.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(skills/1password): repair desktop app auth guidance
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair the existing contributor PR #81825 for the 1Password bundled skill guidance by addressing the remaining review feedback without expanding beyond `skills/1password/SKILL.md` and `skills/1password/references/get-started.md`.

## Repair scope
- Keep direct `op` execution for service-account and desktop-app integration modes.
- Keep tmux only for standalone interactive signin, but make the example shell-safe for the documented macOS/Linux shell expectations or explicitly force/document the shell used in the tmux pane.
- Replace the inaccurate reference to the tmux skill's socket conventions with local guidance or a correct reference.

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81825 by koshaji.
Source issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/52540 by tylerbittner.
Clownfish should preserve attribution to koshaji for the contributor branch repair.

## Validation
- `pnpm check-docs`
- `pnpm check:changed`
credit_notes: Preserve koshaji as the source PR contributor for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81825.
Preserve issue credit for tylerbittner's source report in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/52540.
No contributor CHANGELOG entry is planned because koshaji already dropped it per repo policy in the hydrated PR history.
